ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Define the frontmatter field used as the ID (case-insensitive).
ast.target: 定义用作 ID 的 frontmatter 字段（不区分大小写）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 排除这些文件夹中的笔记。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Toggle the display of notes without IDs.
ast.target: 切换显示没有 ID 的笔记。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Indents notes based on their id level.
ast.target: 根据 ID 级别缩进笔记。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Defines how notes are visually grouped based on ID hierarchy. A value of 1 separates top-level IDs (e.g., 1 vs. 2). A value of 2 adds an additional split between sub-levels (e.g., 1.1 vs. 1.2), and so on.
ast.target: 定义笔记如何根据 ID 层次结构进行视觉分组。值为 1 时分隔顶级 ID（例如 1 与 2）。值为 2 时在子级别之间添加额外分隔（例如 1.1 与 1.2），依此类推。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Define the frontmatter field used as the title shown in the table of contents (case-insensitive).
ast.target: 定义用作目录中显示标题的 frontmatter 字段（不区分大小写）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, notes will be included in the table of contents based on their hierarchy level. If disabled, only notes with the table of contents title property will be shown.
ast.target: 如果启用，笔记将根据其层次结构级别包含在目录中。如果禁用，则仅显示具有目录标题属性的笔记。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Defines which hierarchy level of notes should be included in the table of contents. A value of 1 includes only top-level notes (1, 2, …), 2 includes sub-levels (1.1, 1.2, …), and so on. Notes with the table of contents title property are always included.
ast.target: 定义应包含在目录中的笔记层次结构级别。值为 1 时仅包含顶级笔记（1, 2, …），值为 2 时包含子级别（1.1, 1.2, …），依此类推。具有目录标题属性的笔记始终包含在内。

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 显示没有 ID 的笔记

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Automatically include notes in table of contents
ast.target: 自动将笔记包含在目录中

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.source: Enter note title, note ID or table of contents title to open a note
ast.target: 输入笔记标题、笔记ID或目录标题以打开笔记

ast.name: setTitle
ast.target: 在子序列中创建新笔记

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Compiled in DEV mode. Follow the advice at https://elm-lang.org/0.19.1/optimize for better performance and smaller assets.
ast.target: 在DEV模式下编译。请遵循 https://elm-lang.org/0.19.1/optimize 的建议以获得更好的性能和更小的资源。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: This shouldn't happen. Please file a bug report.
ast.target: 这不应该发生。请提交错误报告。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Failed to open the side panel

ast.name: name
ast.target: 在子序列中创建新笔记

ast.name: name
ast.source: Search notes by title, title of contents title or ID
ast.target: 按标题、目录标题或ID搜索笔记

ast.name: name
ast.source: Set note ID based on another note
ast.target: 根据另一个笔记设置笔记ID
